positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial mountain range landscape, featuring abstract jagged mountain silhouettes combined with bioluminescent constellations and nebulous cosmic dust. The composition must be perfectly centralized and suitable for a repeat print on fabric. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal teal, and pops of metallic gold luminescence. The style should be a blend of modern vector art and intricate mandalas, giving it a clean, high-contrast, and visually impactful look. Minimalist yet maximalist detail, optimized for deep blacks and bright accents.
negative: low resolution, blur, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, amateur, grayscale, solid color blocks, jpeg artifacts, blurry edges
